When called as a script, print a comma-separated list of the open
file descriptors on stdout.
Usage:
fd_stats.py: check all file descriptors
fd_status.py fd1 fd2 ...: check only specified file descriptors
__main__
SC_OPEN_MAX
__doc__
errno
stat
__name__Z
argv
sysconfZ
_MAXFD
rangeZ
test_fds
fstat
OSError
EBADF
S_ISDOOR
st_mode
append
print
join
5/usr/lib64/python3.9/test/subprocessdata/fd_status.py
<module>
